---
title: "Newton-Cotes Integration"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

← [Numerical Methods](../)

Source inspiration: [@mathewsSite].

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [Newton-Cotes Integration](http://localhost:8000/n2003/NewtonCotesMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 8
- Unique animation portals: 4

### Animation Portals

1. [Trapezoidal Rule](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Trapezoidal/Trapezoidal.html) (ok)
2. [Simpson's Rule](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Simpson/Simpson.html) (ok)
3. [Simpson's 3/8 Rule](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Simpson38/Simpson.html) (ok)
4. [Boole's Rule](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Boole/Boole.html) (ok)

- Animation item links found: 4

### Animation Items

1. [Trapezoidal Rule](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Trapezoidal/Trapezoidalaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Trapezoidal/Trapezoidalaa.gif
2. [Simpson's Rule](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Simpson/Simpsonaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Simpson/Simpsonaa.gif
3. [Simpson's 3/8 Rule](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Simpson38/Simpsonaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Simpson38/Simpsonaa.gif
4. [Boole's Rule](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Boole/Booleaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Quadrature/Boole/Booleaa.gif
